results.rendered_html:
pariṣṭi f.
1〉 Hemmung, Hinderniss: ṛtasya devā anu vratā gurbhuvatpariṣṭirdyaurna bhūma  ṚV. 1,65,3  (2). nakiḥ pariṣṭirmaghavanmaghasya te yaddāśuṣe daśasyasi [Page4-0555] 8,77,6 .
— 2〉 gehemmte Lage, Klemme, angustiae: mā te asyāṃ pariṣṭāvaghāya bhūma parādai  ṚV. 7,19,7 . arcanti toke tanaye pariṣṭiṣu medhasātā vājinamahraye dhane 10,147,3 . — Zur Bildung des Wortes vgl. abhiṣṭi, upasti.
